productos.descripcion: Replacement print heads with thermal options.
Electronic scale tickets are available in a variety of sizes and quantities with custom features.
The MS200 portable monorail scale is designed to weigh one trolley and provides stable weighments.

Star® SP742 Dot Matrix Printer has a spill-proof cover, single-cover highlights and the ability to print multiple copies.
The Ohaus Explorer® Series toploader balance features cutting-edge technology and functional design, delivering accurate performance and lab efficiency.
The Star Micronics SP298 ticket printer is a sound and economical choice for simple ticket printing needs.
